package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for jwt_secret_in_source: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodHS256, claims).SignedString([]byte("hardcoded"))` where the signing key is a string literal
type CaseJwtSecretInSourceDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseJwtSecretInSourceModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseJwtSecretInSourceRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseJwtSecretInSourceModel
}

type CaseJwtSecretInSourceService struct {
    repo *CaseJwtSecretInSourceRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseJwtSecretInSourceAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveJwtSecretInSource(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseJwtSecretInSourceDTO) error {
    focus := "jwt_secret_in_source"
    _ = focus
    claims := jwt.MapClaims{"sub": input}
    token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodHS256, claims)
    _, _ = token.SignedString([]byte("hardcoded-secret-key"))
    jwt_secret_source_positive := map[string]int{"jwt": 1, "secret": 2, "source": 3}
    jwt_secret_source_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    jwt_positive_0 := map[string]string{"jwt": input}
    _ = jwt_positive_0
    secret_positive_1 := map[string]string{"secret": input}
    _ = secret_positive_1
    source_positive_2 := jwt_secret_source_positive["source"] + len(input)
    _ = source_positive_2
    return nil
}
